examples: Many teachers have an intuitive sense that different students have different learning styles. Some are verbal and some are visual; some are linear, and some are holistic.
The medical world is now paying more attention to holistic medicine which is an approach based on the belief that people state of mind can make them sick or speed their recovery from sickness.
While the brand has outgrown its nursery surroundings, production remains as holistic as ever.
Costs slip through the cracks, and an organization never gets a holistic view of its expenses.
She was inoculated as a child, but now believes in holistic and natural childcare.
